meta.title: SPACE
meta.description: SPACE is the app to share photo folders with the people who matter. Private, fast, beautiful.

hero.eyebrow: for you and the people who matter
hero.tagline: Your photos. Your people. A place just for you.

items.title: Shared folders
items.body: Create a space, invite friends, upload together. Every folder is a little world

items.title: Invite only
items.body: No one sees your photos unless they're in. No public links, no surprises

items.title: Synced
items.body: Add a photo on your phone, it appears on the tablet of whoever shares the space. Instantly

items.title: Light, fast
items.body: Built to be fluid. Scroll, upload, comment without waiting

items.title: Your memories
items.body: The photos stay yours. Download everything whenever you want, in full control

items.title: Beautiful to use
items.body: Clean interface, light and glass. Because memories deserve a frame

privacyBand.title: Your photos are not a product
privacyBand.body: SPACE is designed so memories stay between those who lived them. No ads, no external tracking, no public feed

cta.bodyPre: We're almost ready. Leave us your email and we'll let you know as soon as SPACE is available
cta.bodyLive: Create your first space in under a minute. Invite anyone you like.

footer.tagline: Your photos. Your people. A place just for you.

intro.sub: The private social layer for photos and videos: high quality, instant upload, cross-platform collaboration.

problem.title: The problem:
problem.copy:
After every trip or party, it's always the same story: hundreds of photos scattered across WhatsApp, Drive and iCloud — slow, incompatible, disorganized.

You end up with just a handful of pictures, your gallery is overloaded, and your best memories get lost in the noise.
problem.quote: "Video showing the group chat scrolling on WhatsApp"
problem.quoteCaption: Insert a short video or gif of the actual chat here.

competitive.title:
Everyone does one piece.
SPACE does all.

market.title: The market:
market.lead: Charts on growth and trends in photo sharing.
market.source: Replace charts with real data (sources: Statista, DataReportal, SensorTower).

business.title: Business model
business.note:
It is free for everyone.
We do not monetize yet.
Freemium version?
bullets: Premium storage for long events and full-quality videos.
Family / group plan with expanded shared space.
Creator / event pack with quick QR access.
Target: first pricing test within 6 months.

cards.title: Frontend
cards.body: Mobile app with a single codebase for iOS and Android.

cards.title: Backend
cards.body: Auth, database and storage centralized on Supabase.

cards.title: Security
cards.body: Tokens in secure store, RLS policies, controlled access.

vision.title: Vision & call to action
vision.heading: Build the future of shared memories with us.
vision.body: We're looking for VC partners to accelerate product, growth and monetization. Target round: [insert amount].
